name: Tart Apples Baked with Orange Juice and Honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a glass baking pan with light cooking spray.
2. Cut the top cone out of each apple and spoon some lemon juice into each.
3. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
4. Add some honey and juice to each, then stuff each with raisins.
5. Microwave, lightly covered, until skins have split and apples are softened.
6. Serve hot.
